title: athyrium thwaitesii
intro: Athyrium thwaitesii, also known as the Ceylonous Lady fern, is a species of fern that is native to Sri Lanka and parts of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Athyrium thwaitesii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Athyrium thwaitesii are typically made by drying the leaves and using them in tea or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
